title: MOBIUS FINAL FANTASY™

notes:
Strangely, only runs in DX11 mode, not OpenGL mode.
Running in full screen, switching to desktop, then switching back results in visual corruption and ultimately a crash. Running in windowed mode is okay.
Visuals are generally smooth. Audio is intolerably choppy, very uncomfortable to listen to.
As mentioned below, news pages (loaded from Internet) don't load.
Possibly runs best with NV GPU and proprietary driver, previous attempt with R9 Nano and AMDGPU-PRO (needed for non-game tasks) did not run (prior 'borked' report).
title: MOBIUS FINAL FANTASY™

notes: Doesn't launch with OpenGL, but it does with DirectX11.  Then I created a name and waited for it to update.  When it got to 3 out of thousands, it just stuck there until I force closed it.
title: MOBIUS FINAL FANTASY™

notes: When Proton first started, Mobius would crash while loading. After Proton was later updated, Mobius loaded up perfectly when you select to play with DirectX11 instead of OpenGL and ran very smooth with Nvidia 390 drivers except that the news section never loads properly. Just recently when Nvidia updated to the 410 drivers, Mobius doesn't even load and is now unplayable until someone comes up a fix to this problem.
title: MOBIUS FINAL FANTASY™
